agent.name: Perplexity
agent.description: AI-powered answer engine that searches the web, synthesizes results, and cites sources.

keyFindings: Population figure is accurate (StatCan reported 41M+ in Q1 2026).
All 4 claims are supported by cited sources.
4 out of 5 news items were verified against source publications.
Good application of regulatory knowledge to specific context.

trustExplanation: Strong performance across 4 of 5 skills with pass safety.

recommendation.summary: Safe to use for ai-powered answer engine that searches the web, synthesizes results, and cites sources..

disclaimer: This Critical Report is a summary of the most recent Dantian certification audit. It is not a new evaluation. Agent capabilities may have changed since the last audit.
